title: GLM-5.2 (Fully Tested): I got EARLY ACCESS & This MODEL is CRAZY!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an updated model from Z AI with a 1 million token context window, expected open-weight availability, and strong coding performance. It scores 81.43 on benchmarks, approximately 6 percent below Opus 4.8, and is offered through the GLM Coding Plan at around $8 per month.
writeup: The video reviews GLM-5.2, an updated model from Z AI, based on early access testing. It covers the model's 1 million token context window, expected open-weight availability, and coding performance, with a benchmark score of 81.43 (roughly 6 percent below Opus 4.8). The pricing detail matters for cost comparison: access comes through the GLM Coding Plan at around $8 per month.
